commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Since disapproval leads to discord, Paul teaches us to be peaceful and to avoid arguments over eating or not eating. Instead, he encourages us to follow the way of upbuilding. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: Sed et qui utitur, "cum gratiarum actione"

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: This applies to both sides equally. The one must become peaceable and the other must not destroy his brother. Without peace it is impossible to edify anyone.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
